title: ButterBee Resources
description: Required resource pack for ButterBee datapack
body:
Contains resources required for the [**ButterBee**](https://modrinth.com/project/butterbee) datapack.

Butterflies and Bees, or **ButterBee**, is an add-on for the world generation mod/datapack **CliffTree**, which further expands on the world with the addition biome-based variations for several mobs!

With new variations for cows, pigs, chickens, wolves, and a new frog, the world is sure to feel much more alive and diverse!
